title: Sabikui Bisco
sourceNotes: Season 1, 12 episodes. Source is a 10-volume light novel series (AniList does not track its chapter count), so this mapping uses the 'Rust-Eater Bisco' manga adaptation instead — complete at 22 chapters across 4 volumes, covering the same content as the anime (both adapt only Light Novel Volume 1). A separately-numbered sequel manga ('Rust-Eater Bisco 2', drawn by a new artist) covers the Sabikui Bisco 2nd Season anime and is out of scope for this file.
